business.name: Castro Roofing & Exteriors
business.tagline: Chattanooga roofing done right by Jorge and crew

hero.headline: The roofers *Chattanooga calls* when it counts
hero.subheadline: Jorge Castro and crew treat every roof like it's their own. Ask Warren, James, or any of our 40 five-star customers.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Complete Roofing Solutions
services_section.subheading: From storm damage repairs to full replacements, we handle every aspect of your roofing needs

services.title: Complete Roof Replacement
services.description: New roofs that look great and perform even better. We work with you from material selection through final cleanup.

services.title: Storm Damage Repair
services.description: Hail, wind, and weather damage repaired right. We handle insurance claims and get your protection restored.

services.title: Roof Inspections
services.description: Thorough assessments to catch problems early. We'll show you exactly what your roof needs and why.

services.title: Exterior Services
services.description: Gutters, siding, and exterior work that complements your roofing investment and protects your home.

about.heading: Jorge Castro & The Castro Roofing Team
about.body: We're the roofing crew Chattanooga homeowners trust when their biggest investment needs protection. Jorge Castro leads every project personally, ensuring the communication and craftsmanship that earned us 40 five-star reviews. From Signal Mountain to East Brainerd, we treat every roof like our reputation depends on it.

reviews.name: James M.
reviews.text: Outstanding work and communication throughout the entire project. Castro Roofing delivered exactly what they promised.

reviews.name: Warren I.
reviews.text: Jorge and his crew exceeded expectations. Great communication, professional work, and my new roof looks fantastic.

reviews.name: Connie G.
reviews.text: Very pleased with our new roof. Jorge Castro and his team are true professionals who deliver quality work.

reviews.name: Cheyenne B.
reviews.text: Jorge puts his heart into every project. You'd be lucky to have him handle your roofing needs.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Chattanooga
service_areas.subheading: Professional roofing services throughout Hamilton County and surrounding areas

cta.heading: Ready to protect your biggest investment?
cta.body: Get your free estimate from the roofing team Chattanooga trusts. Jorge will personally assess your needs and explain your options.
